overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's downtown district at night. The wet pavement reflects vibrant holographic advertisements and neon signs as the character navigates past pedestrians and vehicles along a busy urban street, eventually approaching a major intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown sidewalk with holographic advertisements

events.description: black sedan drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk following a woman in a brown jacket

notable_agents.action: woman in brown jacket walking ahead at steady pace
black sedan driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: tall building facade covered with multiple glowing holographic advertisements and neon signs
tall dark building with vertical illuminated windows rising along the right side
elevated highway or monorail track visible in the distance between buildings
tall street lamp with warm yellow light illuminating the wet pavement
rain-soaked concrete sidewalk reflecting the neon lights from surrounding signs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet downtown sidewalk at night, lined with towering holographic billboards on the left and a massive office building on the right. The camera follows a woman in a brown jacket walking ahead, while vehicles pass by on the multi-lane street to the left. The neon-lit environment reflects off the rain-soaked pavement, creating a characteristic cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown street with prominent purple neon signage

events.description: large purple neon billboard reading 'FEEL THE CHROMATIC' becomes visible on the left building

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through increasing pedestrian traffic, passing a man in a long brown coat

notable_agents.action: man in brown trench coat walking in same direction ahead of ego
pedestrian in bright pink shorts walking opposite direction

entered.detail: tall palm trees visible in the distance lining the street approach
large circular purple neon sign with 'FEEL THE CHROMATIC' text
small illuminated food cart with green neon lighting on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, the street becomes busier with pedestrians moving in both directions. A massive purple neon billboard dominates the left side of the frame, while palm trees become visible in the distance. The character passes a man in a brown coat and approaches a street vendor stall on the right, with the wet pavement continuing to reflect the vibrant city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection with traffic control

events.description: street opens up approaching intersection, revealing crosswalk and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: walking toward a growing crowd gathered at the upcoming intersection

notable_agents.action: muscular man with cybernetic implants and tattoos walking past the camera
vendor standing beside the food cart on the right sidewalk

entered.detail: traffic light suspended over the intersection showing red signal
white striped pedestrian crossing lines visible on the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a major intersection where the street widens and opens up. The purple billboard passes out of view as a traffic signal and crosswalk come into focus ahead. Palm trees line the approach to the intersection, and a street vendor stall becomes prominent on the right. Pedestrians gather ahead, waiting for the signal to change.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with waiting pedestrians

events.description: arriving at crosswalk with red traffic light, pedestrians waiting to cross

agents.ego_description: slowing down and stopping at the crosswalk behind a crowd of waiting pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing at the crosswalk waiting for the light to change

entered.detail: wide open intersection space with multiple crossing directions visible

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character arriving at the intersection crosswalk, where the space opens up significantly. The traffic signal shows red, and a dense crowd of pedestrians has gathered waiting to cross. The holographic billboards of the previous street section are now behind, replaced by the wide intersection space and crosswalk markings on the wet asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked downtown sidewalk that gradually opens into a wide, crowded urban intersection. It begins by trailing a woman in a brown jacket past towering holographic billboards and a massive office building, with neon lights shimmering on the wet pavement. As the walk continues, the environment becomes more congested with pedestrians and a dominant purple neon sign, shifting the focus toward distant palm trees and a street vendor stall on the right. The scene then expands as the character approaches a major intersection, where the narrow sidewalk gives way to a widening street and a visible traffic signal. Finally, the camera arrives at the crosswalk, where the previous billboards recede behind the character to reveal a dense crowd of people gathered on the wet asphalt waiting for the light to change.
